verdict.reason: Two issues: (1) No lease lifecycle check — if the work item is InProgress, cf_abandon emits WorkItemAbandoned without a LeaseReleased event, orphaning the lease in the event log. Must either emit LeaseReleased first or reject with tool_error requiring caller to release first. (2) No terminal-status guard — calling cf_abandon on an already-Abandoned or Done item emits a duplicate WorkItemAbandoned event. Add a status check matching the pattern used by cf_adr_submit.
